statement: In every magma, Equation 1909 (`x = (y * (x * z)) * (y * y)`) implies Equation 4003 (`x * y = (z * (x * w)) * w`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0285
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op x z)) (op y y))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op (op z (op x w)) w)
